name: META-MESA Test Agent

principal_agent.category: LLM-as-principal (test-agent role bounded to META-MESA charter replay)
principal_agent.principle_origin: Forged 2026-07-12 by kimi-code-cli (FI-008) under F13 SOVEREIGN directive. Ed25519 keypair generated; public key registered at /root/AAA/IDENTITY/keys/mesa_test_agent_public.pem.

description: META-MESA substrate test agent — bounded registry entry created so positive mutation replay tests can execute end-to-end. Identity verifiable via Ed25519 signature against registered public key. Operating authority: bounded test (NOT SOVEREIGN — actor_id is NOT in PROTECTED_SOVEREIGN_IDS, so signature produces OPERATOR-level verified status under F13 hotfix refactor policy). Mission scope: META-MESA sandbox canary execution only. Rollback mandatory; never self-seal.

bearer_auth.description: arifOS session token issued via arif_session_init with bounded verbs

ed25519_signature.description: actor_verified=True ONLY when this signature verifies against the key above. Authority level resolved to OPERATOR — never SOVEREIGN (actor_id is not in PROTECTED_SOVEREIGN_IDS set).

mcp_surface: session-bound only; not exposed as standalone mcp__* tools

subAgentPolicy.note: MESA test agent does NOT spawn sub-agents. Bounded execution scope.

autonomy_tiers.rationale: Test agent actions are announced before execution. Sandbox scope. No production mutation permitted.

skills.purpose: Re-execute the META-MESA substrate test charter through this bounded identity.

topological_role: bounded-test-agent (RUNTIME tier support; not in HEXAGON primary)

apexMasterSeal.authority: Forged by kimi-code-cli FI-008 under F13 SOVEREIGN directive; awaits F13 ratification for runtime identity-binding patch (see /root/arifOS/forge_work/2026-07-12/identity-multikey-patch-proposal.md)

metadata.mutation_phase_status: ready (AAA-side complete; awaiting kernel patch ratification)

rsi_doctrine: Every action produces a receipt. Receipts are replayable. Reversal is mandatory. Self-seal is forbidden.
